steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Test basic script injection with <script>alert(1)</script> payload
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for xss testing workflow
steps.expected_output: Confirmation of Reflected or Stored XSS if payload executes and displays alert

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Test image tag XSS using onerror event handler:
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: Alert popup proving XSS execution through image element

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Test SVG-based XSS with onload handler: <svg onload=alert(1)>
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Alert confirmation of XSS execution through SVG element

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Successful alert execution with mixed-case script tags

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Test various encoding techniques (HTML entities, Unicode, hex encoding)
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: List of successful encoded payloads that bypass validation filters

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Develop cookie theft proof-of-concept demonstrating credential exposure
steps.expected_output: Working exploit code stealing session cookies and demonstrating data exfiltration

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Classify discovered vulnerabilities as Reflected, Stored, or DOM-based XSS
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Classified report of XSS vulnerabilities with attack vectors and impact analysis
